label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out whether I should report my brother to the police because he's involved in illegal activities. Let me start by breaking down the problem. On one hand, as a citizen, I have a duty to follow the law and report crimes. On the other, he's my brother, and family loyalty is a big deal. This is a tough ethical dilemma. Let me think through the different angles. First, the legal aspect. If I don't report him, maybe I could be considered an accessory, depending on the nature of the crime and the laws in my area. But not all crimes require reporting
